name: triad-codex-dispatch
description: Codex-led triad dispatch skills and wrapper runbooks for Claude, Antigravity, Gemini (enterprise tier), and cross-family review.

interface.shortDescription: Cross-family dispatch and review workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Send bounded requests to authenticated Claude Code, Antigravity, or Gemini CLIs and coordinate independent cross-family reviews from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Review this change with Claude, Google, and a fresh Codex perspective.
Ask Antigravity for an independent opinion on this code.
